folio.label: 182r
folio.l: Thanne wold she suffre hi~ , done his fantasie
Eft sone , and nat but ones , out of drede
¢ And if she were w childe , at thilke kast
Nomore shulde he pleyen , thilke game
Til fully fourty dayes , weren past
Tha~ne wolde she ones suffre hi~ , do the same
Al were this Onedake , wylde or tame
He gat nomore of hire , for thus she seide
It was to wyues , leccherie and shame
In other cas , if that men w he~ pleide
¢ Two sones , by this Onedak , had she
The whicú she kept in vertu , and lettrure
But now , vn to oure tale , turne we
I sey , so worshipful a creature
And wys ther w , & large witú mesure
So penyble in the werre , & curteis eke
Ne more labour mygút , in werre endure
Was none , thougú al this world me~ shulde seke
¢ Hire riche a ray , ne mygút nat be tolde
As wel in vessel , as in hire clothynge
She was al clad , in perry , and in golde
And eke she left nougút , for non huntynge
To haue of sondry tonges , ful knowynge
Whan æ she leiser hadde , & for to entende
To lerne bookes , was al hire likynge
How she in vertu , mygút hire lyf despende
¢ And shortly , of this storie , for to trete
So dougúty was hire housbond , & eke she
That they co~quered , many regnes grete
In the orient , w many a fair Citee
Ap¹tenau~t , vn to the Magestee
Of Rome , & w strongö hond , held he~ ful faste
Ne neuäe mygút here foomen , don he~ flee
Ay , whil that Onedakes dayes , laste
¢ Here batailles , who so list he~ for to rede
Ageyn Sapor the kyngö , & othere moo
And how æ al this ¸cesse , fel in dede
Why she co~quered , & what title æä to
And after of hire myschef , & hire woo
How æ she was byseged , and I take
Lat hi~ , vn to my Maister , Petrak go
That wryt I now , of this , I vndertake
